name: OpenClaw Observer
description: Real-time observability dashboard for agent runs, tool calls, model I/O, and diagnostic events

enabled.description: Whether the observer plugin is active

bindHost.description: Bind address. Default 0.0.0.0 (all interfaces); set to 127.0.0.1 for loopback-only. Observer has no auth — firewall the port or use a reverse proxy if exposed.

dbPath.description: Absolute path to SQLite db. Empty = ./data/observer.db relative to plugin dir

retentionDays.description: How many days of events to keep in SQLite

bufferSize.description: In-memory ring buffer size for recent events

flushIntervalMs.description: How often (ms) to flush queued events to SQLite

flushBatchSize.description: Force flush when queue reaches this size

maxQueueSize.description: Maximum in-memory storage queue length before oldest queued events are dropped

enabled.description: Redact sensitive fields (api_key, token, secret, etc)

maxFieldBytes.description: Max bytes per field; longer values are truncated
